ab: nu papecir kana tutus mu, pinangse’an da varasa’, na tikulas mu, tineru’an kanantu ni’en na pencir. penauwa nu kinuwadu.
ch: A:要獵捕老鼠是⽤⽯壓式的陷阱，⽵雞是要⽤套頸式的陷阱，那樣做才對。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

ab: mau na kemadu awlra di, ingku na pacepelr ! semalra adi ku karaasa.
ch: B:原來是那樣，是我搞錯了！難怪我都獵捕不到。
en: No wonder! I am mistaken and that’s why I cannot catch any of them.

ab: alra kunu panadamay diya kana marekaduwa na papeciran.
ch: A:那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

ab: ai kasa lra ’inava! nu kemani mu, kasayhu ku lra penecir nu kadaidan lra.
ch: B:好啊！太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: caluwalun lra i ’uma, uwa i suru alaku diya nangku lingaw, kayta i ’uma.
ch: A:田裡的草太長了，你先去倉庫拿我的鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: pinuwayan i iyan na lingaw?
ch: B:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: ulra i ngidiran kana ’ara, musavak u i suru mu, nana’u u lra.
ch: A:在圓簍的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: kilrivak, amana mupanana, idangan na lingaw.
ch: A:小心拿，不要受傷，鐮刀很利。
en: Be careful and don’t get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: di idada’elri nangku pecir!
ch: A:而且不要踩到我的陷阱!
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: ulra i iyan nanu pecir?
ch: B:你的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: kadu i makalusu kana kawi nangku pecir.
ch: A:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: adi u kalaalup da pinuwayan?
ch: B:你不會忘記放的地方嗎?
en: Don’t you forget where it was placed?

ab: ulra ku pinudungan kadu, semalra madalram ku ulra kani ku pecir.
ch: A: 這邊有我做的記號，因此我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: sulung ini. ta ca’anay i dinanuman kivulraw.
ch: A:這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: uniyan mi da sulung, niyam pangasipay kana pangangasipan.
ch: B:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: adi ku diya patalram da pangasipan, panadamay ku lra nu kadaidan lra!
ch: A:我沒有嘗試過釣魚法，你下次教我吧!
en: I have never tried a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: ai! marelranga ta lra mukuwa pangasipa nu masalr lra.
ch: B:好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: nu masalr lra mu, ku panadamay u lra demaway kana sulung.
ch: A:那我下次教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: mahuwahu lra nanu pangangasipan, lramu ulra mupangasip na vulraw! pakunamuni kemedeng.
ch: A:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: nu maremay lra, mahinganghing dadu na sudang, kemedenga ku kani, inu mu uwa alakay ku kana ami kadiyu.
ch: B:等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: kedengu puwa kaningku kani na vulraw, kunu pulralrangay kemedeng.
ch: A:把魚拉到我這邊。我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

ab: ’inava dadu a! miakan ta pakirev harem, matemuy lra na ’ara.
ch: A:太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: anlra! pakunamuna ta muruma’ pu’acara data dinkalranan.
ch: B:走吧！我們快回去和族人分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
